tables.name: sales
tables.description: Fact-style demo sales table used for analytics questions in the POC.

columns.name: region
columns.description: Sales region such as North, South, East, West.

columns.name: units_sold
columns.description: Units sold on the order line.

columns.name: sales_amount
columns.description: Revenue amount for the order line.

business_rules: Average order value can be approximated as SUM(sales_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT order_id).
For monthly trends, group by DATE_FORMAT(order_date, '%Y-%m').
